description: Lente de Delivery: dependencias, ambientes, owners, timing, rollout y roadmap.

checks.description: Dependencies, environments, ownership, timing, or rollout constraints are not explicit.
checks.why: Sin dependencias ni owners no hay plan de entrega realista.

checks.description: Dependencies, owners, MVP scope, nice-to-haves, or roadmap are not explicit enough for PRD execution planning.
checks.why: El plan de ejecucion del PRD requiere MVP, fases y owners explicitos.

checks.description: Rollout approach, target environments, or release constraints are not explicit enough for PRD execution planning.
checks.why: El PRD necesita saber como y donde sale el cambio para evitar que specs y backlog inventen secuencia, ambientes o restricciones de release.
